title: Light Uruguayan Fish Ceviche
description: A bright, low‑sodium ceviche that showcases fresh Atlantic salmon cured in vinegar, accented with citrus and fresh herbs for a clean, airy finish.

ingredients.name: fresh Atlantic salmon fillet
ingredients.notes: skin removed, trimmed into 1 cm cubes

instructions: In a non‑reactive bowl, combine the diced salmon.
Pour vinegar, lime, and orange juices over the fish, stirring gently to coat.
Add seaweed salt, pepper, and mix until the fish is evenly coated.
Cover and refrigerate for 30 minutes to cure the fish and allow flavors to meld.
While curing, dice the cucumber and slice the onion; rinse and chop cilantro and mint.
After 30 minutes, drain 10% of the liquid and discard.
Add cucumber, onion, herbs, and avocado; toss gently.
Serve chilled over a bed of mixed greens or with toasted corn tortilla chips.
